labels: healthy sorghum panicle with no loose smut, normal grain development
sorghum panicle with slight loose smut, small amount of dark powdery spores on 1-10% of panicle
sorghum panicle with moderate loose smut, powdery black spores on 11-25% of panicle
sorghum panicle with heavy loose smut, 26-50% of panicle covered in loose dark spore masses
sorghum panicle severely affected by loose smut, over 50% of panicle is powdery black spore mass, most grain destroyed
